meta.title: Jonathan Brownstein — Remote Contract Senior Application Development Engineer — Ref 1338422
meta.description: Senior contract application development engineer with fifteen years gathering requirements, documenting functional specifications, and coordinating user acceptance testing in regulated enterprise environments. Scoped contract

hero.badge: Remote Contract Senior Application Development Engineer — Ref 1338422 · Contract
hero.description: Senior contract application development engineer with fifteen years on scoped consulting assignments: gather and validate requirements, document functional specifications, coordinate user acceptance testing, and deliver audit ready handoffs in regulated enterprise environments. I translate ambiguous stakeholder requests into developer ready requirements, track status through Agile delivery cycles, and keep sponsors informed as scope shifts. Available immediately for remote contract work from northern Illinois.

highlights.label: Contract consulting delivery, requirements gathering, requirements validation, functional specifications, business process modeling, user acceptance testing, UAT coordination, user stories, product backlogs, stakeholder communication, technical documentation, defect tracking, Agile delivery, SQL, Power BI, Tableau, Jira, Confluence, regulated enterprise systems, remote contract delivery

items.title: Contract Senior Application Requirements and Validation Specialist
bullets: Gathered and validated business and technology requirements for reporting platforms and analytics applications, defining scope, acceptance criteria, and release metrics with internal sponsors.
Translated stakeholder requests into functional specifications and testable requirements for development and QA partners.
Planned and coordinated user acceptance testing with scripted scenarios, defect logging, retest cycles, and sign off documentation before production release.

items.title: Contract Application Integration and Reporting Analyst
bullets: Documented reporting workflows, KPI definitions, and data dependencies for stakeholders adopting new dashboard packages.
Interpreted business questions into feasible reporting options and supported acceptance testing handoffs for recurring operational reporting.

items.title: Contract Systems Validation and Documentation Analyst
bullets: Executed user acceptance style test cycles with defect tracking, reconciliation procedures, and sign off summaries in regulated environments.

contact.title: Available for Contract Engagements
contact.intro: Open to remote contract roles through Randstad and other agency partners. Based in northern Illinois; available for standard business hours and defined deliverable engagements.
